category_sources: Official GitHub README says MD4C is Markdown for C and a Markdown parser implementation in C.
source_facts.description says md4c is a C Markdown parser with a SAX-like interface.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses MD4C Readme.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents parser use, HTML conversion, and Markdown extensions.
Official README links to the project wiki as an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/mity/md4c; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes CommonMark compliance, parser API, HTML conversion, and C implementation.
source_facts.description identifies a C Markdown parser.
